member.name: T:GoodbyeAhmet.Mobile.Converters.IsNotNullConverter
member.summary: Returns true when the bound value is not null.

member.name: T:GoodbyeAhmet.Mobile.Converters.ConnectedColorConverter
member.summary: Returns a based on a boolean (IsConnected). true → primary blue (#1E90FF) — connected false → grey (#424242) — disconnected

member.name: T:GoodbyeAhmet.Mobile.Converters.InvertBoolConverter
member.summary: Inverts a boolean value.

member.name: T:GoodbyeAhmet.Mobile.Models.BypassPreset
member.summary: Represents a DPI bypass configuration preset. Each preset maps to a different packet-manipulation strategy that will be applied inside the VPN packet-processing loop.

member.name: P:GoodbyeAhmet.Mobile.Models.BypassPreset.Key
member.summary: Unique key used for persistence (Preferences).

member.name: P:GoodbyeAhmet.Mobile.Models.BypassPreset.DisplayName
member.summary: Human-readable name shown in the UI picker.

member.name: P:GoodbyeAhmet.Mobile.Models.BypassPreset.Description
member.summary: Short description of what this preset does.

member.name: P:GoodbyeAhmet.Mobile.Models.BypassPreset.SplitClientHello
member.summary: Whether to split the TLS ClientHello across multiple TCP segments. This is the most common DPI bypass technique.

member.name: P:GoodbyeAhmet.Mobile.Models.BypassPreset.SplitPosition
member.summary: Byte offset at which to split the first TLS record. Typical values: 2, 5, or the SNI field offset (~40-50). Only used when is true.

member.name: P:GoodbyeAhmet.Mobile.Models.BypassPreset.MixHostCase
member.summary: Whether to manipulate the HTTP Host header (e.g., mix case: "Host" → "hOsT").

member.name: P:GoodbyeAhmet.Mobile.Models.BypassPreset.FakeTtl
member.summary: TTL value to set on the first outgoing packet of each connection. A low fake-TTL can fool stateful DPI boxes while the packet expires before reaching the real server. 0 = do not modify.

member.name: P:GoodbyeAhmet.Mobile.Models.BypassPreset.DnsRedirectAddress
member.summary: Custom DNS-over-UDP server to redirect DNS queries to, bypassing ISP DNS hijacking. Null = use system DNS.

member.name: P:GoodbyeAhmet.Mobile.Models.BypassPreset.DnsRedirectPort
member.summary: Port for the custom DNS server. Default 53.

member.name: T:GoodbyeAhmet.Mobile.Platforms.Android.DpiBypassVpnService
member.summary: Android VpnService that establishes a TUN interface and proxies TCP/UDP traffic through real sockets, applying DPI bypass techniques on TLS ClientHello and HTTP Host headers.

member.name: M:GoodbyeAhmet.Mobile.Platforms.Android.TcpProxySession.SendWithDpiBypass(System.Byte[])
member.summary: Applies DPI bypass techniques to the first TCP payload (typically TLS ClientHello or HTTP request).

member.name: T:GoodbyeAhmet.Mobile.Platforms.Android.VpnHelper
member.summary: Handles requesting VPN permission from the user via and starting/stopping the .

member.name: M:GoodbyeAhmet.Mobile.Platforms.Android.VpnHelper.StartVpnAsync(System.String)
member.summary: Requests VPN permission (if needed) and starts the VPN service. Returns true if the VPN was started successfully.

member.name: M:GoodbyeAhmet.Mobile.Platforms.Android.VpnHelper.StopVpn
member.summary: Sends a disconnect intent to the VPN service.

member.name: M:GoodbyeAhmet.Mobile.Platforms.Android.VpnHelper.OnActivityResult(System.Int32,Android.App.Result)
member.summary: Must be called from to handle the VPN consent dialog result.

member.name: T:GoodbyeAhmet.Mobile.Services.DnsBlocklistService
member.summary: Manages a set of blocked ad/tracker domains. Domains are stored in a HashSet for O(1) lookup. Supports loading from a raw-text URL (one domain per line, hosts-file format). Persists the downloaded blocklist to local storage so it survives app restarts.

member.name: P:GoodbyeAhmet.Mobile.Services.DnsBlocklistService.DomainCount
member.summary: Number of domains currently loaded.

member.name: P:GoodbyeAhmet.Mobile.Services.DnsBlocklistService.BlockedQueryCount
member.summary: Number of DNS queries blocked since VPN start.

member.name: P:GoodbyeAhmet.Mobile.Services.DnsBlocklistService.IsEnabled
member.summary: Whether ad-blocking is active.

member.name: M:GoodbyeAhmet.Mobile.Services.DnsBlocklistService.IsBlocked(System.String)
member.summary: Returns true if the domain (or any parent domain) is in the blocklist. E.g. "ads.example.com" matches if "example.com" or "ads.example.com" is blocked.

member.name: M:GoodbyeAhmet.Mobile.Services.DnsBlocklistService.ResetCounter
member.summary: Reset the per-session blocked query counter.

member.name: M:GoodbyeAhmet.Mobile.Services.DnsBlocklistService.LoadFromUrlAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Loads domains from a blocklist URL (e.g. StevenBlack hosts, AdGuard, etc.). Supports hosts-file format (127.0.0.1 domain) and plain domain-per-line. The downloaded text is cached to local storage for offline reuse.

member.name: M:GoodbyeAhmet.Mobile.Services.DnsBlocklistService.LoadFromCacheAsync
member.summary: Loads the blocklist from local cache file (if it exists). Called on app startup to restore the previously downloaded list.

member.name: P:GoodbyeAhmet.Mobile.Services.DnsBlocklistService.HasCache
member.summary: Whether a cached blocklist file exists on disk.

member.name: M:GoodbyeAhmet.Mobile.Services.DnsBlocklistService.LoadFromText(System.String)
member.summary: Loads domains from raw text content (hosts-file or plain list).

member.name: M:GoodbyeAhmet.Mobile.Services.DnsBlocklistService.AddDomain(System.String)
member.summary: Adds a single domain to the blocklist.

member.name: M:GoodbyeAhmet.Mobile.Services.DnsBlocklistService.Clear
member.summary: Clears all loaded domains.

member.name: M:GoodbyeAhmet.Mobile.Services.DnsBlocklistService.LoadDefaultListsAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Loads the built-in default blocklist URLs concurrently.

member.name: T:GoodbyeAhmet.Mobile.Services.DnsPacketHelper
member.summary:
Utility class for parsing DNS query packets and crafting spoofed responses. Works directly on raw DNS payload bytes (after stripping IP + UDP headers).
DNS packet layout (RFC 1035): Header: 12 bytes (ID, Flags, QDCount, ANCount, NSCount, ARCount) Question: variable (QNAME + QTYPE + QCLASS) Answer: variable (only in responses)

member.name: M:GoodbyeAhmet.Mobile.Services.DnsPacketHelper.ParseQueryDomain(System.Byte[],System.Int32)
member.summary: Parses the queried domain name from a raw DNS payload. Returns null if the packet is malformed or not a standard query.
member.param: Number of valid bytes in the buffer.
member.returns: The domain name as a string (e.g. "ads.example.com"), or null if parsing fails.

member.name: M:GoodbyeAhmet.Mobile.Services.DnsPacketHelper.GetQuestionSectionEnd(System.Byte[],System.Int32)
member.summary: Returns the QNAME end offset (past the trailing 0x00 + QTYPE + QCLASS) so we know the full question section length. Returns -1 if parsing fails.

member.name: M:GoodbyeAhmet.Mobile.Services.DnsPacketHelper.CraftBlockedResponse(System.Byte[],System.Int32)
member.summary:
Crafts a spoofed DNS response that resolves the queried domain to 0.0.0.0.
Response format: - Same Transaction ID as query - QR=1, OPCODE=0, AA=1, RD=1, RA=1, RCODE=0 - Original question section echoed back - One A record answer: domain → 0.0.0.0, TTL=300
member.returns: The spoofed DNS response bytes, or null if the query couldn't be parsed.

member.name: M:GoodbyeAhmet.Mobile.Services.DnsPacketHelper.CraftNxDomainResponse(System.Byte[],System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Crafts an NXDOMAIN response for non-A/AAAA query types.

member.name: T:GoodbyeAhmet.Mobile.Services.LocalizationService
member.summary: Provides localized strings by loading JSON locale files from embedded resources. Implements so XAML bindings auto-refresh when the language changes at runtime.

member.name: P:GoodbyeAhmet.Mobile.Services.LocalizationService.Instance
member.summary: Static singleton instance for XAML binding via {x:Static}.

member.name: P:GoodbyeAhmet.Mobile.Services.LocalizationService.Item(System.String)
member.summary: Indexer — returns translated string for the given key, or the key itself if no translation is found. Usage in XAML: Text="{Binding [SettingsTitle], Source={x:Static svc:LocalizationService.Instance}}"

member.name: P:GoodbyeAhmet.Mobile.Services.LocalizationService.CurrentLanguage
member.summary: Current language code (e.g. "en-US", "tr-TR").

member.name: M:GoodbyeAhmet.Mobile.Services.LocalizationService.LoadLanguageSync(System.String)
member.summary: Synchronously loads the locale JSON for the specified language code. Safe to call from the main thread during app initialization.

member.name: M:GoodbyeAhmet.Mobile.Services.LocalizationService.LoadLanguageAsync(System.String)
member.summary: Loads the locale JSON for the specified language code. Falls back to en-US if the requested file doesn't exist.

member.name: M:GoodbyeAhmet.Mobile.Services.LocalizationService.Get(System.String,System.Object[])
member.summary: Gets a translated string with format arguments. E.g. Get("Using", "Preset 1") → "Using: Preset 1"

member.name: T:GoodbyeAhmet.Mobile.Services.PresetService
member.summary: Provides the built-in DPI bypass presets. Mirrors the desktop presets translated into Android-compatible packet manipulation parameters.

member.name: M:GoodbyeAhmet.Mobile.Services.PresetService.GetPresets
member.summary: Returns all available bypass presets. The first entry is treated as the default.

member.name: M:GoodbyeAhmet.Mobile.Services.PresetService.GetByKey(System.String)
member.summary: Looks up a preset by its . Falls back to the first preset if the key is not found.

member.name: T:GoodbyeAhmet.Mobile.Services.SettingsService
member.summary: Thin wrapper around MAUI for persisting user settings (selected preset key, auto-start toggle, advanced params, etc.).

member.name: T:GoodbyeAhmet.Mobile.ViewModels.MainViewModel
member.summary: Main view-model: drives the Start/Stop button, preset picker, auto-start toggle, and log console shown on .

member.name: P:GoodbyeAhmet.Mobile.ViewModels.MainViewModel.Presets
member.summary: Available bypass presets for the Picker.

member.name: P:GoodbyeAhmet.Mobile.ViewModels.MainViewModel.LogEntries
member.summary: Log entries shown in the console CollectionView.

member.name: F:GoodbyeAhmet.Mobile.ViewModels.MainViewModel._isConnected
member.summary: Whether the VPN tunnel is currently active.

member.name: F:GoodbyeAhmet.Mobile.ViewModels.MainViewModel._isBusy
member.summary: True while a connect/disconnect operation is in progress.

member.name: F:GoodbyeAhmet.Mobile.ViewModels.MainViewModel._selectedPreset
member.summary: The currently selected bypass preset.

member.name: F:GoodbyeAhmet.Mobile.ViewModels.MainViewModel._startOnBoot
member.summary: Whether to auto-start the VPN on device boot.

member.name: F:GoodbyeAhmet.Mobile.ViewModels.MainViewModel._isLogVisible
member.summary: Whether the log console panel is visible.

member.name: M:GoodbyeAhmet.Mobile.ViewModels.MainViewModel.ToggleVpnAsync
member.summary: Toggles the VPN connection on/off. The actual Android VpnService integration will be added in Step 4.

member.name: M:GoodbyeAhmet.Mobile.ViewModels.MainViewModel.ToggleLog
member.summary: Toggles log console visibility.

member.name: M:GoodbyeAhmet.Mobile.ViewModels.MainViewModel.AddLog(System.String)
member.summary: Adds a timestamped entry to the log console.

member.name: F:GoodbyeAhmet.Mobile.ViewModels.MainViewModel.toggleVpnCommand
member.summary: The backing field for .

member.name: P:GoodbyeAhmet.Mobile.ViewModels.MainViewModel.ToggleVpnCommand
member.summary: Gets an instance wrapping .

member.name: F:GoodbyeAhmet.Mobile.ViewModels.MainViewModel.toggleLogCommand
member.summary: The backing field for .

member.name: P:GoodbyeAhmet.Mobile.ViewModels.MainViewModel.ToggleLogCommand
member.summary: Gets an instance wrapping .

member.name: T:GoodbyeAhmet.Mobile.ViewModels.SettingsViewModel
member.summary: ViewModel for SettingsPage — mirrors the WPF SettingsWindow: language, preset selection, advanced DPI parameters, and toggles.

member.name: M:GoodbyeAhmet.Mobile.ViewModels.SettingsViewModel.OnSelectedPresetChanged(GoodbyeAhmet.Mobile.Models.BypassPreset)
member.summary: Executes the logic for when just changed.
member.param: The new property value that was set.
member.remarks: This method is invoked right after the value of is changed.

member.name: F:GoodbyeAhmet.Mobile.ViewModels.SettingsViewModel.saveCommand
member.summary: The backing field for .

member.name: P:GoodbyeAhmet.Mobile.ViewModels.SettingsViewModel.SaveCommand
member.summary: Gets an instance wrapping .

member.name: F:GoodbyeAhmet.Mobile.ViewModels.SettingsViewModel.loadBlocklistCommand
member.summary: The backing field for .

member.name: P:GoodbyeAhmet.Mobile.ViewModels.SettingsViewModel.LoadBlocklistCommand
member.summary: Gets an instance wrapping .

member.name: F:GoodbyeAhmet.Mobile.ViewModels.SettingsViewModel.resetCommand
member.summary: The backing field for .

member.name: P:GoodbyeAhmet.Mobile.ViewModels.SettingsViewModel.ResetCommand
member.summary: Gets an instance wrapping .

member.name: T:GoodbyeAhmet.Mobile.ViewModels.LanguageOption
member.summary: Simple record for language picker items.

member.name: M:GoodbyeAhmet.Mobile.ViewModels.LanguageOption.#ctor(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Simple record for language picker items.

member.name: T:GoodbyeAhmet.Mobile.Resource
member.summary: Android Resource Designer class. Exposes the Android Resource designer assembly into the project Namespace.

member.name: T:CommunityToolkit.Mvvm.ComponentModel.__Internals.__KnownINotifyPropertyChangingArgs
member.summary: A helper type providing cached, reusable instances for all properties generated with .

member.name: F:CommunityToolkit.Mvvm.ComponentModel.__Internals.__KnownINotifyPropertyChangingArgs.IsConnected
member.summary: The cached instance for all "IsConnected" generated properties.

member.summary: The cached instance for all "IsBusy" generated properties.
